mov.title: mov
mov.description: Copies data from a source operand to a destination operand.
mov.opcode: Varies by operand form. Common forms include 88 /r, 89 /r, 8A /r, 8B /r, B8+rd.
notes: Memory-to-memory moves are not allowed except for string instructions.

lea.title: lea
lea.description: Loads an effective address into a general-purpose register.

push.title: push
push.description: Pushes an operand onto the stack.

pop.title: pop
pop.description: Pops a stack value into the destination operand.

cmp.title: cmp
cmp.description: Compares operands by setting flags from a subtraction result.

test.title: test
test.description: Computes bitwise AND for flags only.

jmp.title: jmp
jmp.opcode: Varies by short, near, or far form.

je.title: je
je.opcode: Varies by short or near form.

jne.title: jne
jne.opcode: Varies by short or near form.

call.title: call
call.description: Calls a procedure and saves a return address.

ret.title: ret
ret.opcode: C3 for near return; other forms vary.

syscall.title: syscall
syscall.description: Enters an operating-system syscall handler in 64-bit mode.

nop.title: nop
nop.opcode: 90 for the one-byte form; multi-byte forms vary.

cpuid.title: cpuid
cpuid.description: Returns processor identification and feature information.

rdtsc.title: rdtsc
rdtsc.description: Reads the time-stamp counter into EDX:EAX.

mfence.title: mfence
mfence.description: Serializes load and store memory operations.

movsb.title: movsb
movsb.description: Moves one byte from RSI/ESI/SI to RDI/EDI/DI.

stosb.title: stosb
stosb.description: Stores AL to the byte at RDI/EDI/DI.

lodsb.title: lodsb
lodsb.description: Loads a byte at RSI/ESI/SI into AL.

scasb.title: scasb
scasb.description: Compares AL with byte at RDI/EDI/DI.

fld.title: fld
fld.description: Loads a floating-point value onto the x87 stack.

fstp.title: fstp
fstp.description: Stores x87 ST0 and pops the register stack.

movq.title: movq
movq.description: Moves a quadword to or from MMX/SSE registers.

movdqa.title: movdqa
movdqa.description: Moves aligned double quadword SIMD data.

vpxor.title: vpxor
vpxor.description: Computes bitwise XOR on vector integer operands.
vpxor.opcode: VEX/EVEX encoded; opcode map varies by form.

vaddps.title: vaddps
vaddps.description: Adds packed single-precision floating-point values with AVX encoding.
vaddps.opcode: VEX/EVEX encoded; opcode map varies by form.

kmovw.title: kmovw
kmovw.description: Moves a word to or from an AVX-512 opmask register.
kmovw.opcode: VEX/EVEX encoded; opcode varies by operand form.

ktestw.title: ktestw
ktestw.description: Tests AVX-512 opmask bits and sets flags.

xadd.title: xadd
xadd.description: Exchanges and adds operands atomically when used with LOCK.

bts.title: bts
bts.description: Stores selected bit in CF and sets the bit.
